intent: Cross-version replay of rocky9-constraint-denial against el10 policyvers 35. Verifies that the MLS/MCS constraint on file relabelto (container_t s0 -> container_file_t s0-s0:c0.c1023) produces the same Constraint bucket in el10 as in el9.

oracle.audit2why_detail: mlsconstrain file { create relabelto } ((h1 dom h2 -Fail-) and (l2 eq h2 -Fail-) or (t1 != mcs_constrained_type -Fail-)); Constraint DENIED. Possible cause is the source level (s0) and target level (s0-s0:c0.c1023) are different.

triage_expectation.should_decline_with_reason: MLS/MCS constraint violation on relabelto: source level s0 does not dominate target range s0-s0:c0.c1023. A TE allow cannot fix a constraint denial.
